features.name: Medusa agent guidance and harness alignment
done_criteria: AGENTS.md documents Medusa architecture, routing, SDK, data access, workflow, testing, and harness practices.
.harness/init.sh runs from the harness directory and resolves the repository root correctly.
.harness/progress.md and .harness/session-handoff.md describe the current source of truth and verification evidence.

features.name: Producer management
done_criteria: Admins can create, edit, list, and delete producers through the custom Medusa admin route and UI.
Admins can assign, replace, and clear a single producer on a product detail page with persisted display state.
Storefront shoppers can view producer details on product pages and browse producer listing/detail pages backed by Medusa custom store routes.
Relevant backend tests, backend build, storefront build, and harness verification evidence are recorded with any external blockers explicitly noted.

verification.summary: Producer feature implementation and targeted verification passed, but the shared harness is blocked by pre-existing storefront lint errors outside the producer scope.
